headline: EBay Beats Estimates on Quarterly Profit, Sales, Merchandise Volume. Stock Falls.
summary: Global online marketplace  eBay  posted better-than-expected profit, sales, and gross merchandise volume for its first quarter.  In premarket trading Thursday, the stock declined 1.5%.  EBay surpassed expectations for its major metrics, but offered second-quarter guidance that may have disappointed.
